sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_now64 (id UInt32, created_at DateTime64(3)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_now64 (id, created_at) VALUES (1, now64()), (2, now64(6, 'Europe/London'));
UPDATE test_now64 SET created_at = now64(3) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, created_at, now64(9, 'America/New_York') AS current_time FROM test_now64;
SELECT id, created_at, now64(0) AS rounded_time FROM test_now64 WHERE created_at > now64(3);
